# Linear Models with One Factor {one-way-models-1}

```{r one-way-models-1-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/one-way-models-1-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/one-way-models-1/"
)
```

```{r child-one-way-models-1, child="../lecture-content/19-one-way-models-1.Rmd"}
```
